questions.q: 時間（　　）あれば、手伝えるのに。
questions.exp: 〜さえ：if only / as long as (the minimal condition is met)。〜さえ〜ば / 〜さえすれば expresses a sufficient (often minimal) condition for the main clause to hold — 'as long as X, Y' / 'if on
questions.en: If only I had time, I could help.

questions.q: （　　）、本当のことだよ。
questions.exp: 〜だって：because / but / however (casual defensive)。だって at the beginning of a sentence is a casual way to give a reason or excuse — 'because', 'but'. Often carries a defens
questions.en: Because it's the truth.

questions.q: （　　）、知らなかったんだから仕方ない。
questions.exp: 〜だって：because / but / however (casual defensive)。だって at the beginning of a sentence is a casual way to give a reason or excuse — 'because', 'but'. Often carries a defens
questions.en: But I didn't know — it can't be helped.

questions.q: （　　）趣味はない。
questions.exp: 〜これといって：nothing in particular / nothing notable。〜といって (especially in the fixed form これといって) expresses that there is 'nothing in particular' worth noting — 'no specific
questions.en: I don't have any particular hobbies.

questions.q: （　　）理由はない。
questions.exp: 〜これといって：nothing in particular / nothing notable。〜といって (especially in the fixed form これといって) expresses that there is 'nothing in particular' worth noting — 'no specific
questions.en: There's no particular reason.

questions.q: 約束を破る（　　）、信頼できない。
questions.exp: 〜ようでは：if it's like that / at this rate。〜ようでは expresses a hypothetical condition with a negative, critical, or warning tone — 'if X is like that, (then somethin
questions.en: If you break promises like that, I can't trust you.

questions.q: こんなミスをする（　　）、プロとは言えない。
questions.exp: 〜ようでは：if it's like that / at this rate。〜ようでは expresses a hypothetical condition with a negative, critical, or warning tone — 'if X is like that, (then somethin
questions.en: If you make mistakes like this, you can't call yourself a pro.

questions.q: 今日はいいこと（　　）の一日だった。
questions.exp: 〜ずくめ：nothing but / entirely / all X。〜ずくめ expresses that something is entirely or exclusively X — 'nothing but X', 'all X'. Often used for qualities, colors,
questions.en: Today was a day full of nothing but good things.

questions.q: 異例（　　）の出来事だった。
questions.exp: 〜ずくめ：nothing but / entirely / all X。〜ずくめ expresses that something is entirely or exclusively X — 'nothing but X', 'all X'. Often used for qualities, colors,
questions.en: It was an event full of unprecedented things.

questions.q: 彼のシャツは血（　　）だった。
questions.exp: 〜まみれ：smeared / covered with (often messy or unpleasant)。〜まみれ expresses that something is physically covered or smeared with X, typically an unpleasant or messy substance — mud,
questions.en: His shirt was covered with blood.

questions.q: 長い間使っていなかった本はほこり（　　）だった。
questions.exp: 〜まみれ：smeared / covered with (often messy or unpleasant)。〜まみれ expresses that something is physically covered or smeared with X, typically an unpleasant or messy substance — mud,
questions.en: The long-unused book was covered with dust.

questions.q: いい子（　　）のはやめなさい。
questions.exp: 〜ぶる：pretend to be / put on airs of。〜ぶる creates a verb meaning 'pretend to be X' or 'put on airs of being X'. Often carries a mildly critical nuance — the s

questions.q: この町には独特な（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜ものがある：there is something (about it) / is impressively。〜ものがある expresses that there is a certain quality or feature worth noting about something — 'there's something X about it

questions.q: 彼の考え方には深い（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜ものがある：there is something (about it) / is impressively。〜ものがある expresses that there is a certain quality or feature worth noting about something — 'there's something X about it
questions.en: There's something deep about his way of thinking.

questions.q: 好き（　　）、興味がある。
questions.exp: 〜というか：or rather / I mean。〜というか is a discourse marker used when the speaker is searching for a more accurate description or hedging a previous sta
questions.en: I don't 'like' it exactly — I'm interested.

questions.q: 聞く（　　）、彼らの会話を聞いていた。
questions.exp: 〜ともなしに：unintentionally / without consciously。〜ともなく expresses that an action is performed unintentionally, without conscious focus — 'unintentionally X' / 'without me
questions.en: I was listening to their conversation without meaning to.

questions.q: 待つ（　　）待っていたら、彼が現れた。
questions.exp: 〜ともなく：unintentionally / without consciously。〜ともなく expresses that an action is performed unintentionally, without conscious focus — 'unintentionally X' / 'without me
questions.en: I wasn't really waiting, but he showed up.

questions.q: 経験（　　）、早めに行動した方がいい。
questions.exp: 〜からいえば：from X's viewpoint / speaking from X。〜からいうと / 〜からいえば / 〜からいって is a variant of 〜からすると that expresses perspective — 'from X's viewpoint'. Common in analysis an
questions.en: From experience, it's better to act early.

questions.q: 値段（　　）、このレストランは高級だ。
questions.exp: 〜からいって：from X's viewpoint / speaking from X。〜からいうと / 〜からいえば / 〜からいって is a variant of 〜からすると that expresses perspective — 'from X's viewpoint'. Common in analysis an
questions.en: Judging from the price, this restaurant is upscale.

questions.q: 彼の意見もわからなく（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜もない：not that I don't / it's not that X isn't。〜なくもない is a double negative that hedges a positive statement — 'it's not that I don't X' / 'it's not impossible that X'.

questions.q: そう考えられなく（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜もない：not that I don't / it's not that X isn't。〜なくもない is a double negative that hedges a positive statement — 'it's not that I don't X' / 'it's not impossible that X'.
questions.en: It's not that I can't think of it that way.

questions.q: このプロジェクトの運命は彼の判断（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜にかかっている：depends on / hinges on。〜にかかっている expresses that something 'depends on' or 'hinges on' X — the outcome is determined by X. Common when emphasizin
questions.en: The fate of this project hinges on his judgment.

questions.q: すべては明日の天気（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜にかかっている：depends on / hinges on。〜にかかっている expresses that something 'depends on' or 'hinges on' X — the outcome is determined by X. Common when emphasizin
questions.en: Everything depends on tomorrow's weather.

questions.q: 遅れた（　　）、電車が止まったからだ。
questions.exp: 〜というのは：what is called / the fact is / the reason is。〜というのは has several related senses: (1) 'what is called X / the thing called X' — introducing a definition or concept; (2
questions.en: The reason I was late is that the train stopped.

questions.q: 学ぶ（　　）、楽しいことだ。
questions.exp: 〜というのは：what is called / the fact is / the reason is。〜というのは has several related senses: (1) 'what is called X / the thing called X' — introducing a definition or concept; (2
questions.en: Learning is a joyful thing.

questions.q: 彼は放浪（　　）、ここに辿り着いた。
questions.exp: 〜の果てに：at the very end of / after (extensive process)。〜果てに expresses that the main-clause outcome came at the end of a long, often harsh, process — 'after extensive X, finall
questions.en: After long wandering, he arrived here.

questions.q: 激しい議論（　　）、ようやく合意に達した。
questions.exp: 〜の果てに：at the very end of / after (extensive process)。〜果てに expresses that the main-clause outcome came at the end of a long, often harsh, process — 'after extensive X, finall
questions.en: After fierce debate, we finally reached an agreement.

questions.q: この結果が出た（　　）、実験が成功したということだ。
questions.exp: 〜ということは：what it means is / so (it follows that)。〜ということは is a discourse marker that introduces a logical conclusion from a preceding statement — 'what this means is', 'i
questions.en: The fact that we got this result means the experiment was a success.

questions.q: 明日休みだ（　　）、今夜遅くまで起きていられる。
questions.exp: 〜ということは：what it means is / so (it follows that)。〜ということは is a discourse marker that introduces a logical conclusion from a preceding statement — 'what this means is', 'i
questions.en: Tomorrow being a holiday means I can stay up late tonight.

questions.q: どちら（　　）、犬より猫の方が好きだ。
questions.exp: 〜かといえば：as for whether / if you ask whether。〜かというと embeds a question for discussion — 'as for whether X, (the answer is Y)'. Often used when the speaker raises a qu
questions.en: If anything, I prefer cats to dogs.

questions.q: 上手（　　）、まだまだだ。
questions.exp: 〜かというと：as for whether / if you ask whether。〜かというと embeds a question for discussion — 'as for whether X, (the answer is Y)'. Often used when the speaker raises a qu
questions.en: As for whether I'm good at it — not yet, by far.

questions.q: この規則は絶対的な（　　）守ってください。
questions.exp: 〜ものとして：as / regarded as / assuming that。〜ものとして is used to frame something as being treated or considered as X — 'as X' or 'regarded as X'. Often in hypothetical
questions.en: Please follow this rule as something absolute.

questions.q: そう決まった（　　）、次に進みましょう。
questions.exp: 〜ものとして：as / regarded as / assuming that。〜ものとして is used to frame something as being treated or considered as X — 'as X' or 'regarded as X'. Often in hypothetical
questions.en: Assuming that's decided, let's move on.

questions.q: 踊っ（　　）の気分だ。
questions.exp: 〜てもいいくらい：enough to / to the extent that (you could)。〜てもいいくらい expresses that the intensity or extent of something is so high that it justifies an extreme action — 'it's so X
questions.en: I feel so good I could dance.

questions.q: 書類を作成した。（　　）上司の承認を待つだけだ。
questions.exp: 〜あとは：the rest is / all that's left is。〜あとは expresses that after a main action is complete, only X remains to be done — 'the rest is X' / 'all that's left is X
questions.en: I prepared the documents. The rest is just waiting for the boss's approval.

questions.q: 材料は全部そろった。（　　）料理するだけだ。
questions.exp: 〜あとは：the rest is / all that's left is。〜あとは expresses that after a main action is complete, only X remains to be done — 'the rest is X' / 'all that's left is X
questions.en: All the ingredients are ready. The rest is just cooking.

questions.q: それ（　　）、私でもできる。
questions.exp: 〜だけなら：if only / if it's just X。〜だけなら expresses 'if it's only X (then Y is OK)' — a conditional statement that limits the scope to a minimal case. Often
questions.en: If it's just that, even I can do it.

questions.q: ちょっと（　　）、貸してあげる。
questions.exp: 〜だけなら：if only / if it's just X。〜だけなら expresses 'if it's only X (then Y is OK)' — a conditional statement that limits the scope to a minimal case. Often
questions.en: If it's just a little, I'll lend it to you.

questions.q: 問題は解決し（　　）、悪化している。
questions.exp: 〜ないのみならず：not only does not / not just failing to。〜ないのみならず is a literary concessive-additive combining the negative ない with the 'not only' のみならず — 'not only does X not ha
questions.en: Not only is the problem not solved, but it's getting worse.

questions.q: 返事をくれ（　　）、連絡も取れない。
questions.exp: 〜ないのみならず：not only does not / not just failing to。〜ないのみならず is a literary concessive-additive combining the negative ない with the 'not only' のみならず — 'not only does X not ha
questions.en: Not only does he not reply, I can't even contact him.

questions.q: 年をとる（　　）、記憶力が衰えてくる。
questions.exp: 〜にしたがって：in accordance with / as (X progresses)。〜にしたがって has two related senses: (1) 'in accordance with' — following rules, orders, or guidelines (noun + にしたがって); (2) '
questions.en: As one ages, one's memory declines.

questions.q: 指示（　　）、作業を進めた。
questions.exp: 〜にしたがって：in accordance with / as (X progresses)。〜にしたがって has two related senses: (1) 'in accordance with' — following rules, orders, or guidelines (noun + にしたがって); (2) '
questions.en: I proceeded with the work according to the instructions.

questions.q: 会社の方針（　　）行動してください。
questions.exp: 〜に沿って：along / in accordance with。〜に沿って has two related senses: (1) spatially 'along' (川に沿って歩く 'walk along the river'); (2) figuratively 'in accordance wi
questions.en: Please act in accordance with company policy.

questions.q: 計画（　　）プロジェクトを進めた。
questions.exp: 〜に沿って：along / in accordance with。〜に沿って has two related senses: (1) spatially 'along' (川に沿って歩く 'walk along the river'); (2) figuratively 'in accordance wi
questions.en: I proceeded with the project according to plan.

questions.q: 買った（　　）、一度も使っていない。
questions.exp: 〜ものの：although / even though (formal)。〜ものの is a formal concessive marker meaning 'although X, Y', where the main clause often expresses a limitation, unexpect
questions.en: Although I bought it, I've never used it.

questions.q: 約束した（　　）、守れなかった。
questions.exp: 〜ものの：although / even though (formal)。〜ものの is a formal concessive marker meaning 'although X, Y', where the main clause often expresses a limitation, unexpect
questions.en: Although I promised, I couldn't keep my word.

questions.q: 時間が止まった（　　）静かだ。
questions.exp: 〜かのように：as if / as though。〜かのように compares something to a hypothetical or imagined scenario — 'as if X were the case'. It is more literary and more
questions.en: It's quiet as if time had stopped.

questions.q: 会える（　　）、もう一度会いたい。
questions.exp: 〜ものなら：if (it were) possible / if I could。〜ものなら combined with a potential form expresses a hypothetical wish that the speaker considers difficult or impossible —
questions.en: If I could meet (him) again, I would want to.

questions.q: 飛べる（　　）、今すぐ日本へ行きたい。
questions.exp: 〜ものなら：if (it were) possible / if I could。〜ものなら combined with a potential form expresses a hypothetical wish that the speaker considers difficult or impossible —
questions.en: If I could fly, I'd want to go to Japan right now.

questions.q: データ（　　）分析する。
questions.exp: 〜をもとに：based on / on the basis of。〜をもとに / 〜をもとにして expresses that something is created, judged, or produced 'based on' a source material, data, or foundati
questions.en: I'll analyze based on the data.

questions.q: 経験（　　）アドバイスします。
questions.exp: 〜をもとに：based on / on the basis of。〜をもとに / 〜をもとにして expresses that something is created, judged, or produced 'based on' a source material, data, or foundati
questions.en: I'll give advice based on experience.

questions.q: 頭が痛い（　　）、熱もある。
questions.exp: 〜上に：in addition to / on top of (that)。〜上に is an additive connector meaning 'in addition to X, (also) Y'. The Y clause builds on or extends the X clause in the
questions.en: On top of having a headache, I also have a fever.

questions.q: 彼は頭がいい（　　）、親切だ。
questions.exp: 〜上に：in addition to / on top of (that)。〜上に is an additive connector meaning 'in addition to X, (also) Y'. The Y clause builds on or extends the X clause in the
questions.en: He is smart and on top of that, kind.

questions.q: 引き受けた（　　）、全力を尽くす。
questions.exp: 〜上は：now that / since (formal, implies commitment)。〜上は (うえは) is a formal concessive / justificatory marker — 'now that X, Y must follow'. The main clause typically express
questions.en: Now that I've taken it on, I'll give it my all.

questions.q: 日本に来た（　　）、日本語を話せるようになりたい。
questions.exp: 〜上は：now that / since (formal, implies commitment)。〜上は (うえは) is a formal concessive / justificatory marker — 'now that X, Y must follow'. The main clause typically express
questions.en: Now that I've come to Japan, I want to be able to speak Japanese.

questions.q: 引き受けた（　　）、最後までやる。
questions.exp: 〜以上は：since / now that / as long as。〜以上(は) expresses that given the premise of the 以上 clause, a certain conclusion or obligation follows — 'since X is the c
questions.en: Now that I've taken it on, I'll see it through.

questions.q: この商品は安い。（　　）、品質もいい。
questions.exp: 〜しかも：moreover / what's more / on top of that。しかも is a sentence-initial conjunction meaning 'moreover' / 'what's more' — adds additional, often surprising or emphatic
questions.en: This product is cheap. What's more, the quality is good.

questions.q: 雨が降っている。（　　）、風も強い。
questions.exp: 〜しかも：moreover / what's more / on top of that。しかも is a sentence-initial conjunction meaning 'moreover' / 'what's more' — adds additional, often surprising or emphatic
questions.en: It's raining. On top of that, the wind is strong.

questions.q: 状況は悪くなる（　　）った。
questions.exp: 〜ばかりだ：nothing but / only one way (to decline / increase)。〜ばかりの / 〜ばかりだ expresses that something is trending in only one direction — 'only X-ing' / 'nothing but X'. Similar to 〜一
questions.en: The situation kept only getting worse.

questions.q: 人口は減る（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜ばかりだ：nothing but / only one way (to decline / increase)。〜ばかりの / 〜ばかりだ expresses that something is trending in only one direction — 'only X-ing' / 'nothing but X'. Similar to 〜一
questions.en: The population keeps only decreasing.

questions.q: この薬には副作用（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜の恐れがある：risk of / fear that (may happen)。〜恐れがある expresses that there is a risk or possibility of something (usually negative) happening — 'there's a risk of X'.
questions.en: This medicine has a risk of side effects.

questions.q: そう結論づけ（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜ざるを得ない：cannot help but / have no choice but to。〜ざるを得ない is a formal / literary construction meaning 'cannot help but X' or 'have no choice but to X'. Expresses that ext
questions.en: One cannot help but conclude so.

questions.q: 事実を認め（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜ざるを得ない：cannot help but / have no choice but to。〜ざるを得ない is a formal / literary construction meaning 'cannot help but X' or 'have no choice but to X'. Expresses that ext
questions.en: I have no choice but to acknowledge the facts.

questions.q: 晴れ（　　）、雨が降り出した。
questions.exp: 〜たかと思うと：no sooner had / just when (unexpected change)。〜かと思うと expresses that two events happen in quick succession, often with an unexpected change — 'no sooner had X than Y'
questions.en: Just when it cleared up, it started raining.

questions.q: 寝た（　　）、もう起きている。
questions.exp: 〜かと思ったら：no sooner had / just when (unexpected change)。〜かと思うと expresses that two events happen in quick succession, often with an unexpected change — 'no sooner had X than Y'
questions.en: Just when I thought he was asleep, he's already awake.

questions.q: 忙しいが、断る（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜ほどではない：not to the extent of / not as much as。〜ほどではない is a negation of 〜ほど, expressing that something is 'not to the extent' of X — downplaying a comparison. Often us
questions.en: I'm busy, but not so much that I need to decline.

questions.q: 難しいけど、不可能な（　　）。
questions.exp: 〜ほどではない：not to the extent of / not as much as。〜ほどではない is a negation of 〜ほど, expressing that something is 'not to the extent' of X — downplaying a comparison. Often us
questions.en: It's difficult, but not to the extent of being impossible.

questions.audio: 彼女は髪をくしでといてリボンで結んだ。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: She combed her hair and bound it with a ribbon.
This dictionary is handy in size.
Do not put new wine into old bottles.
He often dropped in on me.
questions.exp: 「彼女は髪をくしでといてリボンで結んだ。」

questions.audio: お心づかいに厚くお礼申し上げます。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: I'm very grateful for your sympathy.
She filled the glass with wine.
His letter alludes to the event.
questions.exp: 「お心づかいに厚くお礼申し上げます。」

questions.audio: 彼女は吠える犬を怖がる。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: She is afraid of barking dogs.
She folded up the towels and put them away in the cupboard.
He was suspected of underground action.
We made a check of the student' records.
questions.exp: 「彼女は吠える犬を怖がる。」

questions.audio: 日経指数は大引け間際に大きく跳ね上がりました。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: The Nikkei index jumped dramatically just before closing.
We visited her house, where we had a Christmas party.
He uses honey instead of sugar.
He extorted a large amount of money from her.
questions.exp: 「日経指数は大引け間際に大きく跳ね上がりました。」

questions.audio: 雨が私のレインコートの下までしみとおった。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: As a rule, Japanese people are not good at foreign languages.
Who is in charge of the office while the boss is away?
Oops, my pen has run out of ink.
questions.exp: 「雨が私のレインコートの下までしみとおった。」

questions.audio: 便利な隠しコマンド教えてあげようか。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: Want me to show you a really useful hidden command?
If you use the quit command noted below, you can make the application exit.
Before getting on a horse, you usually put a saddle on its back.
The government finances are severely constrained because of falling tax revenues.

questions.audio: ここだけの話だが彼の考え方は深みに欠ける。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: Between you and me, he's a shallow thinker.
He looks quite sophisticated for his age.
His explanation of the problem adds up to nonsense.
This mustard really bites the tongue.
questions.exp: 「ここだけの話だが彼の考え方は深みに欠ける。」

questions.audio: なぜ彼と踊らなかったの？
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: Why didn't you dance with him?
The Board of Education governs the schools.
Make sure you save the receipt.
questions.exp: 「なぜ彼と踊らなかったの？」

questions.audio: 彼女はそ知らぬ顔をした。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: She picked up one of the glass vases.
I was never so humiliated in my life.
It was too nice a day to stay inside.
questions.exp: 「彼女はそ知らぬ顔をした。」

questions.audio: 彼女は腰に革のベルトをしている。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: She is wearing a leather belt around her waist.
Save it on the external hard drive.
The plane flew over the mountain.
questions.exp: 「彼女は腰に革のベルトをしている。」

questions.audio: これらの標本はいくつかの種類に分類される。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: These specimens are divided into several categories.
Jim sat alone with his arms folded.
The cola made my tongue tingle.
He warmed himself at the stove.
questions.exp: 「これらの標本はいくつかの種類に分類される。」

questions.audio: パソコンを持ってない人は、このMP3プレーヤー機能をフルに使いこなせません。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: People who don't have a computer can't make full use of this MP3 player function.
Everyone has their own strong and weak points.
John is not so much a genius as a hard worker.
The stock market crash forced many retirees back into the job market.
questions.exp: 「パソコンを持ってない人は、このMP3プレーヤー機能をフルに使いこなせません。」

questions.audio: 彼は経済上の理由で計画を断念した。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: He gave up the plan for economic reasons.
Only I was able to jump across the stream then.
The job isn't anywhere near done.
questions.exp: 「彼は経済上の理由で計画を断念した。」

questions.audio: 彼女は国内でフィギュアスケートの第一人者だと認められている。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: She is recognized as the best figure-skater in the country.
He could find her house easily.
He defies the present government which is no less oppressive than its predecessor.
We cannot predict what will happen.
questions.exp: 「彼女は国内でフィギュアスケートの第一人者だと認められている。」

questions.audio: ペンか鉛筆を持っていますか。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: Do you have a pen or a pencil?
Death is certain to all, all shall die.
He likes Japanese, and he's good at it.
A series of blasts reduced the laboratory to ruins.
questions.exp: 「ペンか鉛筆を持っていますか。」

questions.audio: ご家族の皆様おかわりありませんか。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: They made for the scene of the accident.
Woods grow greener in the spring.
The roof is shining in the sun.
questions.exp: 「ご家族の皆様おかわりありませんか。」

questions.audio: １０年といえば相当な時間だ。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: Ten years is a long time.
I was caught in the rush hour.
The delinquent boy was arraigned for stealing a bicycle.
While a brain operation is being performed, both doctors and nurses must handle the patient with kid gloves and yet with all speed practical.
questions.exp: 「１０年といえば相当な時間だ。」

questions.audio: 私は何匹かのかわいそうな猫が追い出されるのを見た。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: I saw some poor cats kicked out.
She cried for joy when she heard that her son had survived the plane crash.
The town was zoned for factories and residences.
Well, after all Japan also cut itself off from the world.
questions.exp: 「私は何匹かのかわいそうな猫が追い出されるのを見た。」

questions.audio: 債券発行による調達資金は予算の赤字を補填するのに使われる。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: The proceeds from the bond issue will be used to finance the budget deficit.
The cattle are marked with brands.
The injured bird fell to the ground.
questions.exp: 「債券発行による調達資金は予算の赤字を補填するのに使われる。」

questions.audio: この近くにゴルフコースはありますか。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: Is there a golf course near here?
Thank you very much for your letter of January 7th.
The bill is expected to be enacted during the present session.
Nick can speak Portuguese very well. That's because he's been studying it for 5 years.
questions.exp: 「この近くにゴルフコースはありますか。」

questions.audio: 玲子のオススメという本を、その場で軽く流し読みしてみる。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: I'll try giving the book "Reiko's Recommended" a quick skim read on the spot.
I don't know whether she believed me or not but in any case it seems she doesn't automatically dismiss talk of the supernatural.
That translation is said to be true to the original.
Good points: The pleasure of disposing of enemies with a variety of combos.
questions.exp: 「玲子のオススメという本を、その場で軽く流し読みしてみる。」

questions.audio: 省エネルギーの全国運動が展開中だ。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: A national campaign for energy saving is underway.
The notice in the park said, "Keep off the grass."
He was cowed by her intelligence.
I can't find my garment bag.
questions.exp: 「省エネルギーの全国運動が展開中だ。」

questions.audio: トムは何事も楽しんでやるんだ。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: Tom enjoys himself at everything he does.
Unless you hurry, you will be late for school.
Interest on loans is high at present.
Nancy has a very lively and sweet temperament.
questions.exp: 「トムは何事も楽しんでやるんだ。」

questions.audio: 私は奔放な生き方にあこがれている。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: I long for an uninhibited way of life.
The niece looks like her aunt.
Many scientists have the reputation of being eccentric.
I think the soup needs a bit of salt.
questions.exp: 「私は奔放な生き方にあこがれている。」

questions.audio: 私達はいつも彼の忠告を取り入れるというわけではない。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: We do not always take his advice.
Any bed is better than no bed.
You don't see many dial phones around anymore.
Do you have any other guidebooks about Thailand?
questions.exp: 「私達はいつも彼の忠告を取り入れるというわけではない。」

questions.audio: 彼らは青銅で像を鋳造した。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: They cast bronze into a statue.
Sometimes machines can make an unconscious person breathe for years.
We went down the river in a small boat.
Parliamentary activity has become a political tug of war between the ruling and opposition parties over the issue.
questions.exp: 「彼らは青銅で像を鋳造した。」

questions.audio: 私は気が短いし、口も軽い男だ。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: I'm short-tempered, and a loose-tongued man.
To talk during a concert is rude.
The meeting ended on an optimistic note.
The concert concluded with the national anthem.
questions.exp: 「私は気が短いし、口も軽い男だ。」

questions.audio: メグはわくわくしている。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: The balance at the bank stands at two million yen.
Traveling to the southern states during the winter will be costlier than it is now.
questions.exp: 「メグはわくわくしている。」

questions.audio: 大男総身に知恵が回りかね。
questions.q: 音声の内容に合うものはどれか。
opts: With a big man it's hard for the blood to get up to the brain.
There was no electricity for two days in the aftermath of the typhoon.
